report.title: AGI/ASI Governance Frameworks & Enterprise AI Transformation Master Blueprint
report.abstract: This comprehensive technical blueprint defines the strategic and architectural requirements for Global Systemically Important Financial Institutions (G-SIFIs) and policymakers to navigate the transition to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). It synthesizes global regulatory mandates—including the EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, Basel III, and HKMA expectations—with advanced technical architectures such as Kafka-based WORM audit logging, OPA-based compliance-as-code, and the EAIP v3.0 protocol. Key findings include a 10-stage AI evolution model, civilizational-scale safety protocols (Cognitive Resonance), and a phased implementation roadmap for 2026–2030 targeting intelligence sovereignty.
